ddls:
CREATE TABLE "penalties" (
  "penalty_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each penalty */,
  "penalty_type" TEXT /* Type of penalty (e.g., Offensive Holding) */,
  "penalty_date" TEXT /* Date the penalty occurred */,
  "opponent" TEXT /* Opponent team */,
  "week" INTEGER /* Week of the game */,
  "quarter" INTEGER /* Quarter of the game when the penalty occurred */,
  "time" TEXT /* Time remaining in the quarter when the penalty occurred */,
  "down" INTEGER /* Down number at the time of the penalty */,
  "distance" INTEGER /* Distance to the first down */,
  "declined" TEXT /* Indicates if the penalty was declined */,
  "offset" TEXT /* Indicates if there was an offsetting penalty */,
  "yardage" INTEGER /* Yardage lost due to the penalty */,
  "home" TEXT /* Indicates if the game was played at home */,
  "player_id" INTEGER /* ID of the player who committed the penalty */,
  "referee_id" INTEGER /* ID of the referee who called the penalty */,
  "game_id" INTEGER /* ID of the game */,
  "outcome_impact" TEXT /* Impact of the penalty on the game outcome */,
  "incident_description" TEXT /* Detailed description of the incident */,
  "video_link" TEXT /* Link to video footage of the incident */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("penalty_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_penalties_opponent FOREIGN KEY ("opponent") REFERENCES teams ("team_name"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_penalties_game_id FOREIGN KEY ("game_id") REFERENCES games ("game_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "teams" (
  "team_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each team */,
  "team_name" TEXT /* Name of the team */,
  "conference" TEXT /* Conference the team belongs to */,
  "division" TEXT /* Division within the conference */,
  "team_logo" TEXT /* URL of the team's logo */,
  "team_colors" TEXT /* Primary and secondary team colors */,
  "team_founded_date" TEXT /* Date the team was founded */,
  "team_website" TEXT /* URL of the team's official website */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("team_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "games" (
  "game_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each game */,
  "date" TEXT /* Date the game was played */,
  "home_team_id" INTEGER /* ID of the home team */,
  "away_team_id" INTEGER /* ID of the away team */,
  "stadium" TEXT /* Stadium where the game was held */,
  "season" TEXT /* Season in which the game was played */,
  "home_score" INTEGER /* Final score of the home team */,
  "away_score" INTEGER /* Final score of the away team */,
  "attendance" INTEGER /* Number of spectators */,
  "weather_conditions" TEXT /* Weather conditions during the game */,
  "game_length" TEXT /* Duration of the game */,
  "game_status" TEXT /* Status of the game (e.g., completed, postponed, canceled) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("game_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_games_away_team_id FOREIGN KEY ("away_team_id") REFERENCES teams ("team_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_games_home_team_id FOREIGN KEY ("home_team_id") REFERENCES teams ("team_id")
)
column_names: Quarter of the game when the penalty occurred
Time remaining in the quarter when the penalty occurred
Down number at the time of the penalty
Indicates if the penalty was declined
Indicates if there was an offsetting penalty
Yardage lost due to the penalty
Indicates if the game was played at home
ID of the player who committed the penalty
ID of the referee who called the penalty
Impact of the penalty on the game outcome
Link to video footage of the incident
URL of the team's official website
Stadium where the game was held
Season in which the game was played
Final score of the home team
Final score of the away team
Status of the game (e.g., completed, postponed, canceled)
